items.title: Shipping AI Agent (SA V5)
items.note: V5 = 1,301 lines, 23 sections. Running on M1 PID 91997. Section U gate re-run pending. 5 locked process rules from Chain Electric: (1) multi-ship-to → child SDs under parent order ID, (2) tag fulfillment source, (3) SKU substitutions logged with reason, (4) courtesy_adjustment as separate invoice line, (5) cb_internal_note on every SD.

items.title: Truth Sources Lockdown
items.note: Build ~/nu-brain/truth_sources.json manifest (mirrored to Drive). Migrate every hard-coded path in every script/agent/tool to reference truth_source_path(key) helper. Deploy daily audit verify_truth_sources.py. Add pre-commit hook blocking new hard-coded paths. M5-write / M1-read-only boundaries enforced in code.

items.title: Legacy Rules Lockdown Session
items.note: Audit every established rule from March 17–present. Encode into ~/.openclaw/config/legacy_rules.yaml AND LEGACY_MEMORY.md IMMUTABLE RULES section. Verify Legacy queries them before every response. Includes: investigation principle, M5-write/M1-read flow, truth source routing, all 18 V5 rulings, dealer formula, PO-never-halts-SD.

items.title: G Brain iCloud → Drive migration
items.note: Move G Brain storage from iCloud to Google Drive. Consistent with truth-source principle (M5 = source, M1 = read).

items.title: Customer Payment Terms Audit
items.note: Aaron or CB exports QB customer payment terms. SA ingests, flags discrepancies vs default "Due on Receipt". CB updates QB where Aaron approves Net-30/Net-60. Deferred from V5.
